title: AgentDoc Review Report
description: Enriched review report for `adoc review` and (V3.6) the `adoc_review` MCP tool. Embeds the V3.1 Object Diff envelope alongside V3.3 source-path impact and required-reviewer projections. See V3-DESIGN.md and ADR-0018 / ADR-0019.

diff.description: Embedded V3.1 Object Diff envelope (adoc.diff.v0). Validated against `adoc.diff.v0.schema.json` separately so each schema stays independently consumable; only the outer shape is checked here.

impact.description: Verified Knowledge Objects whose `impacts:` declaration intersects the changed-file set. Sorted by Object ID.

required_reviewers.description: Owners aggregated across changed verified objects and impacted objects. Sorted by owner.

diagnostics.description: Compile diagnostics surfaced during either snapshot's compile.
